## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm turbo run build lint test` passes locally
- [ ] Changeset added for user-facing changes (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Docs updated (MDX stories; `pnpm docs:api` if the public API changed)
- [ ] Accessibility: keyboard + ARIA contract preserved (ACCESSIBILITY.md updated if changed)
